name: Crafts for Kids, Again
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix cornstarch and 1 cup water.
2. Add the remaining cold water to the mixture.
3. Microwave on high for 8-9 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes until thickened.
4. Pour half of the thickened mixture into six small bowls.
5. Add desired food coloring to each bowl.
6. For play dough:
a. In a large saucepan, combine flour, salt, cream of tartar, water, and oil.
b. Cook over low heat until the dough reaches the desired consistency.
c. Allow the mixture to cool, then add food coloring and flavorings (such as clove oil or wintergreen oil) as desired.
Makes 4 cups.
